title: Refactor: Replace nested conditionals with guard clauses
original_text: Refactored to replace nested conditionals with guard clauses. Identified deeply nested conditionals. Added guard clauses for early returns. Simplified conditional structure. Improved code readability. Result: nested conditionals replaced.
expected_subject: refactor(simplify): replace nested conditionals with guard clauses
expected_body_lines: - Add guard clauses for early returns
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(simplify): replace nested conditionals with guard clauses"
